topic: Theory of Taxation - Tax and Customs Theory
course_outcomes: Describe features of a good tax system

units.title: What Taxes Are
units.unit_goal: Understand the meaning of taxes, why they matter, and how they differ from other revenue sources.

lessons.title: Tax Basics
lessons.goal: Understand the definition of taxes.
micro_steps: Read the formal definition of taxes

lessons.title: Compulsory but Unrequited
lessons.goal: Understand why taxes are compulsory and unrequited.
micro_steps: Distinguish taxes from direct personal payment for services

lessons.title: Other Revenue Sources
lessons.goal: Differentiate taxes from fees, fines, and investment income.
micro_steps: Match examples to the correct revenue source

lessons.title: Why Government Needs Taxes
lessons.goal: Test understanding of why taxation is central to government financing.
micro_steps: Identify why taxes matter more than optional charges
Explain why governments rely on taxation

lessons.title: Unit 1 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Prove you can define taxes and distinguish them from other funding sources.
micro_steps: Compare taxes with fees, fines, and dividends

units.title: Taxation Law
units.unit_goal: Understand taxation law and the main Kenyan tax laws listed in the presentation.

lessons.title: What Taxation Law Covers
lessons.goal: Understand the scope of taxation law.
micro_steps: Identify what it says about liability
Connect it to collection and recovery

lessons.title: Kenya's Main Tax Laws
lessons.goal: Memorize the primary tax laws listed in the presentation.
micro_steps: Match each law to its main area
Differentiate substantive tax laws from procedural law

lessons.title: Law Match
lessons.goal: Match each tax law to the tax area it governs.
micro_steps: Match Excise Duty Act to excise
Match Tax Procedures Act to administration and enforcement

lessons.title: Law Checkpoint Quiz
lessons.goal: Test understanding of tax law foundations.
micro_steps: Choose the correct law for a tax issue
Differentiate tax base from tax administration

lessons.title: Unit 2 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show you understand taxation law and the main laws in Kenya.
micro_steps: Explain what taxation law covers beyond the tax charge itself

units.title: Types and Classification of Taxes
units.unit_goal: Master types of taxes and the difference between direct and indirect taxation.

lessons.title: Income Tax
lessons.goal: Understand what income tax is and why it is important.
micro_steps: Explain why it is widely imposed

lessons.title: Consumption Taxes
lessons.goal: Understand VAT, GST, and sales tax as consumption taxes.
micro_steps: Explain why VAT is a consumption tax
Explain value added in a supply chain

lessons.title: Other Taxes
lessons.goal: Understand excise duties, customs duties, and stamp duties.

lessons.title: Direct vs Indirect Tax
lessons.goal: Differentiate direct and indirect taxes clearly.
micro_steps: Match examples to direct or indirect
Explain why indirect taxes raise prices

lessons.title: Tax Classification Quiz
lessons.goal: Test understanding of tax types and classification.
micro_steps: Identify whether a tax is direct or indirect
Choose the best tax type for an example

lessons.title: Unit 3 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate mastery of tax types and classification.
micro_steps: Give examples of each from Kenya

units.title: Functions of Taxation
units.unit_goal: Understand the revenue, social, political, economic, and redistribution functions of taxation.

lessons.title: Revenue Function
lessons.goal: Understand taxation as the main source of government revenue.
micro_steps: List examples of services funded by taxes
Explain diversion of private wealth to public use

lessons.title: Social and Political Function
lessons.goal: Understand how taxes shape behaviour and policy.
micro_steps: Use the retirement benefit and cigarette examples

lessons.title: Economic Function
lessons.goal: Understand the microeconomic and macroeconomic effects of taxation.
micro_steps: Explain how taxes protect domestic industries
Explain higher tax versus lower tax effects on spending

lessons.title: Redistribution Function
lessons.goal: Understand taxation as a tool for economic equality.
micro_steps: Explain the idea of taxing the rich to support the poor
Explain the social consequences of no taxation

lessons.title: Function Sorter
lessons.goal: Match examples to the correct function of taxation.

lessons.title: Unit 4 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show you understand the major functions of taxation.
micro_steps: Explain why taxation is more than just revenue raising

units.title: Structural Features of Taxes
units.unit_goal: Master taxpayers, tax base, tax periods, and tax rates.

lessons.title: Taxpayers and Tax Base
lessons.goal: Understand the first two structural features of taxes.
micro_steps: Identify examples from income tax, VAT, and excise

lessons.title: Tax Periods
lessons.goal: Understand how tax periods operate.
micro_steps: Identify the income tax period in Kenya
Identify the VAT tax period in Kenya

lessons.title: Tax Rates
lessons.goal: Understand flat and varying tax rates.
micro_steps: Identify individual marginal rates and VAT rates

lessons.title: Structure Match
lessons.goal: Connect each structural feature to the correct example.
micro_steps: Match tax base to taxable subject

lessons.title: Unit 5 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Prove you understand the four structural features of taxes.

units.title: Tax Rate Structures
units.unit_goal: Understand proportional, progressive, regressive, marginal, average, and effective tax rates.

lessons.title: Proportional, Progressive, Regressive
lessons.goal: Differentiate major tax rate structures.
micro_steps: Use VAT and income tax examples
Explain how the rate changes with the tax base

lessons.title: Marginal Rate
lessons.goal: Understand marginal tax rate.
micro_steps: Connect it to progressive tax systems

lessons.title: Average vs Effective Rate
lessons.goal: Understand average and effective tax rates.
micro_steps: Explain why economic income may differ from taxable income

lessons.title: Rate Logic Match
lessons.goal: Match tax rate concepts to the correct descriptions.
micro_steps: Match marginal, average, and effective to their calculations

lessons.title: Unit 6 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate mastery of tax rate structures.
micro_steps: Compare marginal, average, and effective tax rates

units.title: Tax Expenditures
units.theme: Policy Tools Inside the Tax System
units.unit_goal: Understand tax incentives, concessions, advantages, disadvantages, and costs of tax expenditures.

lessons.title: What Tax Expenditures Are
lessons.goal: Understand the meaning and categories of tax expenditures.

lessons.title: How Tax Expenditures Are Delivered
lessons.goal: Understand the forms tax expenditures can take.
micro_steps: Explain why each reduces tax burden

lessons.title: Costs, Advantages, and Disadvantages
lessons.goal: Understand the trade-offs of tax expenditure programs.
micro_steps: Explain why tax expenditures cost revenue
Explain the advantage of avoiding double handling
Explain disadvantages such as complexity and weak monitoring

lessons.title: Expenditure Sorter
lessons.goal: Classify different tax expenditure features correctly.
micro_steps: Match examples to incentive or concession
Match features to advantage or disadvantage
Identify direct versus indirect government spending

lessons.title: Unit 7 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show you understand tax expenditures deeply.

units.title: Canons of Taxation and Good Tax Policy
units.unit_goal: Master classic canons of taxation and modern principles of good tax policy.

lessons.title: Main Canons of Taxation
lessons.goal: Memorize and explain equity, certainty, convenience, and economy.
micro_steps: Explain each canon in simple terms
Connect each canon to taxpayer experience

lessons.title: Equity and Fairness
lessons.goal: Understand fairness in tax policy.

lessons.title: System Qualities
lessons.goal: Understand certainty, simplicity, accountability, and transparency.
micro_steps: Explain parliamentary scrutiny and access to information

lessons.title: Efficiency, Flexibility, Neutrality
lessons.goal: Understand advanced principles of tax policy.
micro_steps: Explain neutrality and why governments sometimes depart from it

lessons.title: Fiscal and Policy Objectives
lessons.goal: Understand why a good tax system must meet revenue and policy goals together.
micro_steps: Connect policy design to system effectiveness

lessons.title: Principles Challenge
lessons.goal: Test all major taxation principles together.
micro_steps: Identify which principle matches a scenario

lessons.title: Unit 8 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate mastery of taxation principles and good tax policy.
micro_steps: List the good tax policy principles
Explain how a good tax system should look in practice

units.title: The Tax Unit
units.unit_goal: Understand individuals, families, partnerships, trusts, and companies as tax units.

lessons.title: What Is a Tax Unit?
lessons.goal: Understand the basic concept of the tax unit.
micro_steps: Explain why tax systems must choose a subject of taxation
Connect tax unit to tax design

lessons.title: Individuals and Families
lessons.goal: Understand how Kenya generally treats individuals and spouses.
micro_steps: Explain why spouse income is usually not aggregated

lessons.title: Entities and Their Members
lessons.goal: Understand how partnerships, trusts, and companies are treated.
micro_steps: Explain flow-through treatment for partnerships and trusts

lessons.title: Entity Match
lessons.goal: Match entities to the correct tax treatment.

lessons.title: Unit 9 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show that you understand who may be treated as a tax unit.

units.title: Sovereignty and Jurisdiction to Tax
units.unit_goal: Understand sovereign power, source-based jurisdiction, and residence-based jurisdiction.

lessons.title: Sovereign Right to Tax
lessons.goal: Understand the sovereign right of states to design tax systems.
micro_steps: Identify Parliament, KRA, and Judiciary roles

lessons.title: Territorial Jurisdiction
lessons.goal: Understand source-based taxation.
micro_steps: Explain what locally sourced income means
Explain why it is the narrower approach

lessons.title: Worldwide Jurisdiction
lessons.goal: Understand residence-based taxation.
micro_steps: Explain treatment of residents and non-residents

lessons.title: Jurisdiction Sorter
lessons.goal: Differentiate source and residence rules accurately.
micro_steps: Match examples to source-based or residence-based approach
Compare local and foreign source income treatment

lessons.title: Unit 10 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate understanding of sovereignty and tax jurisdiction.
micro_steps: Identify roles of Parliament, KRA, and Judiciary

units.title: International Taxation and DTAs
units.unit_goal: Understand international tax enforcement problems and the purpose of Double Taxation Agreements.

lessons.title: International Tax Enforcement
lessons.goal: Understand why cross-border tax enforcement is difficult.
micro_steps: Explain why foreigners can be hard to tax in practice
Explain the role of offshore assets
Explain the principle that countries do not usually enforce each other's tax laws

lessons.title: What DTAs Are
lessons.goal: Understand the role and purpose of Double Taxation Agreements.
micro_steps: Explain why DTAs are usually bilateral

lessons.title: How DTAs Work
lessons.goal: Understand allocation of taxing rights and foreign tax credits.
micro_steps: Explain how DTAs allocate taxing rights

lessons.title: Cross-Border Scenario
lessons.goal: Apply DTA logic to a double taxation example.
micro_steps: Decide which country may give relief
Explain why countries negotiate reciprocal arrangements

lessons.title: Unit 11 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show you understand international taxation agreements.
micro_steps: Explain allocation of taxing rights and exchange of information

units.title: Tax Evasion, Avoidance, and Planning
units.unit_goal: Master the difference between evasion, avoidance, and planning, then consolidate the whole topic.

lessons.title: Tax Evasion
lessons.goal: Understand what tax evasion is and why it is serious.
micro_steps: Explain why it leads to penalties and jail terms

lessons.title: Tax Avoidance
lessons.goal: Understand what tax avoidance is.
micro_steps: Explain the idea of paying no more tax than legally required

lessons.title: Tax Planning
lessons.goal: Understand tax planning and tax efficiency.
micro_steps: Explain what makes a plan tax-efficient

lessons.title: Compliance Sorter
lessons.goal: Distinguish evasion, avoidance, and planning accurately.
micro_steps: Match conduct to evasion, avoidance, or planning
Explain why similar-looking actions can differ legally

lessons.title: Grand Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate full mastery of the Theory of Taxation topic.
micro_steps: Explain features of a good tax system
Differentiate tax evasion, avoidance, and planning

lessons.title: Legendary Review Path
lessons.goal: Mixed final review across the entire module.
micro_steps: Mixed principles and tax policy questions

daily_practice.description: Recycles weak lessons, recent checkpoints, and commonly confused comparisons like direct vs indirect tax and evasion vs avoidance.
